abilities: Justice rains from above! (self and hostile)
chatter: Forget regulation. After this mission, I'm throwing a party.
Good leadership makes all the difference.
I should get a puppy. We had the most adorable Rottweiler back at base...
No one's a natural. We all have to put in the work.
Pre-flight checklist complete. Running clean and hot.
The first time I flew this suit, I crashed. I don't crash anymore.
There is always room for improvement.
Fliers, we are cleared for takeoff. Let's lock that airspace down. (with at least three flying characters total on the team, including Pharah)
Finally, a unit that understands the importance of military discipline. (with at least three professionalistic characters total on the team, including Pharah)
Rockets, bombs, sonic tech, and... Reinhardt. I guess we're going in loud. (if Junkrat , Lúcio and Reinhardt are on the team)
I don't need medical support, I just won't get hit! (with Lúcio and Moira on the team)
One more win? This should be easy.
Victory is close, but don't go easy on them.
Don't let that get to you. It's time to focus.
We need to give this our all!
Work together, and we can overcome this.
This is it. Let's show them how it's done.
We can do this if we fight hard and smart.
OK, my head's in the game.
Ooh, I'm gonna shove them in a locker.
You've hang-glided over a volcano, Fareeha. This is nothing. (rarely)
I don't wanna talk about it. (killed while using Barrage)
I'm going to keep knocking them into pits. That seems effective. (getting environmental kills in previous fight)
I'm going to keep knocking them off cliffs. That seems effective. (getting environmental kills in previous fight)
It's crunch time! Luckily I can do a thousand crunches. (high team pressure)
We can do better than this, come on! We're shredded! (high team pressure)
I was dishing it out for a minute there. (after multi-kill)
Time to pick up where I left off. (after multi-kill)
Hey, we won the fight! (team kill)
Need reinforcements. Can I get an ETA?
I'm on top of the world!
I knew I could count on you.
Thanks for the armor. (healed by Brigitte )
I will not waste this opportunity!
You show 'em, Reinhardt! (witnessing Reinhardt use Earthshatter)
call-outs: They outnumber us. Keep it tight.
You'd better stay out of range!
Steady your hearts! We're almost through!
They're almost out of time. Hold on and we win.
We're almost at the end. Hold strong!
No time. Let's get it done.
This is our last attack! Give it everything!
eliminations: Messy, but we got it done. (non-direct hit)
When I'm hitting my shots, you can't touch me.
Guess you won't be sending a letter this time. (eliminating Ana )
Common criminal. (eliminating Ashe , Junkrat or Roadhog ; Hazard not included)
Crime doesn't pay. (eliminating Ashe , Junkrat or Roadhog ; Hazard not included)
Outlawed. (eliminating Ashe , Junkrat or Roadhog ; Hazard not included)
I'm taking this round, Brigitte. (eliminating Brigitte )
What happened to your shield? (eliminating Brigitte , Reinhardt or Sigma ; Domina and Winston not included)
What direction were you aiming?! (eliminating Cassidy , Soldier: 76 or Widowmaker ; Emre not included)
Got you this time, Cole. (eliminating Cassidy )
Just cutting down on the glare. (eliminating Illari )
Big targets! So satisfying. (eliminating Mauga ; Roadhog not included)
Still having fun over there? (eliminating Mauga )
Too bad Talon never taught you discipline! (eliminating Reaper , Sombra or Vendetta )
Don't mess with my family. (eliminating Widowmaker )
Float like a jellyfish, sting like a jellyfish.
Huh! I didn't know that was fatal!
Ooh! My adrenaline is pumping! (on low HP)
Talk about danger close. (on low HP)
You thought you had me. (on low HP)
Direct hits at any range. (long-range elimination)
Ahh... that just feels so GOOD! (long-range elimination)
Out-predicted and out-played. (eliminating enemy using a movement-based ability)
Right where I expected you to go. (eliminating enemy using a movement-based ability)
This airspace is closed. (eliminating airborne enemy)
Twitchy dogfight. Just how I like it. (both Pharah and opponent airborne)
Duck, dodge, and dunk. (after using Concussive Blast on self)
Scootin' and shootin'! (after using Concussive Blast on self)
We're a good team, mother! (Nano-Boosted by Ana )
You think I don't know my own mother's tricks? (eliminating a Nano-Boosted enemy)
You dashed right into that one, Genji! (eliminating Genji using Swift Strike)
Where do you think you're going? (eliminating enemy being Life Gripped by Lifeweaver )
Dr. Zhou and I? We get it done. (friendly Mei uses Blizzard)
Only room for one raptor in these skies. (eliminating another airborne Pharah )
That's not justice. (eliminating another Pharah using Barrage)
You can steal a suit, but you can't steal skill. (eliminating another Pharah using Barrage)
You can't fly, Reinhardt! (eliminating airborne Reinhardt )
Rockets don't care if you're invisible! (eliminating Sombra using Stealth)
I love working with Zaryanova. (eliminating enemy trapped in Zarya 's Graviton Surge)
Too bad those bubbles don't last forever. (eliminating Zarya using Particle Barrier)
They don't give these suits to just anyone.
Everyone has a plan until a rocket hits them in the face.
What can I say? I'm a survivor.
You don't have to thank me.
Ooh! What an uppercut! (eliminating enemy while using Jump Jet)
Get out of my airspace! (eliminating airborne enemy)
Here's a tip. Don't jump into the metal glove. (eliminating enemy using a movement-based ability)
I bring the fist to you! (eliminating enemy while using Concussive Blast)
Pow! Right out of nowhere, huh?! *laughs* (eliminating enemy while using Concussive Blast)
Look out for that first step.
The ultimate shutdown. (eliminating any enemy using ultimate ability)
You still spinning around down there? Huh, maybe not. (eliminating Reaper using Death Blossom)
Okay, Cole! Take it easy! (to Cassidy )
Reinhardt, you've still got it! (to Reinhardt )
Ha ha! The hamster got a kill! (to Wrecking Ball )
interactions: Ana : So you're going with Cole . Joining Overwatch . Pharah : Isn't that what you want? Ana : What I want... never should have mattered to begin with.
Pharah : You're still hiding. When are you coming back for good? Ana : I'm trying, Fareeha. Please, be patient with me. Pharah : I've been patient for years, what's a little while longer...

Ana : Is Fareeha getting enough rest between missions? Mercy : Ana, your daughter is more than capable of caring for herself! Ana : She never napped when she was little. She was cranky all the time. Pharah : Mom! Everyone can hear you!
Pharah : Thank you, mother... Ana : You're welcome, Fareeha...
Baptiste: Just to warn you, I... don't have a lot of experience healing people who fly. Pharah: Just hit me in midair. How hard could it be?
Baptiste: Knock, knock. Pharah: Who's there? Baptiste: Atch. Pharah: Atch who? Baptiste: Sounds like you have a cold. Let me heal you up!

Brigitte : Trust me, everyone. With Bastion on our side, this is going to go great! Bastion : *sheepish beeps* Pharah : Just make sure you're shooting them and not me, please. Brigitte : Well, I'm happy to have you.
Pharah: Ooh... I think I went a bit overboard on the weights yesterday. Brigitte: Pace yourself! That's what I always tell Reinhardt . Not that he ever listens.

Brigitte: Hey, can I look at the wings on your suit again? Pharah: I thought you preferred to stay on the ground. Brigitte: It's for a different idea I had. I-I just thought the view from up there would be... inspirational.

Cassidy : You might be able to beat me in basketball, but... how 'bout a couple rounds of bowling? Pharah : So... you want me to beat you at every sport, then? Mercy : Ooh! If I come, can we play with bumpers?

Cassidy : Remember when we took one of these for a joyride? Pharah : I remember my C.O. yelling at me for goofing around with Overwatch agents. Cassidy : That's your problem! Always worrying about breaking the rules. (one of two): Mercy : Someone has to keep you in order, Cole. Pharah : We can't all damn the consequences and ride off into the sunset, Cole.
D.Va : Being part of Overwatch , getting to save the world... Isn't it awesome, Pharah? Pharah : Yeah. It is pretty awesome.
Pharah: Why not... fire arrows that explode? Hanzo: With enough skill and precision, explosives are unnecessary. Pharah: You saying I can't aim? *incredulous laugh* I can aim.
Junkrat: Hey, rocket lady... do they make that suit in my size? Pharah: *laughter* Oh, you couldn't handle one of these. Junkrat: Why not?! I was born to fly...
Junkrat : Peter Piper picked a pepp-- No. Peter Piper pecked a-- Ugh! Kiriko : Are you people always this loud? Pharah : He's not with us.

Pharah: I see your sneakers. You, me, the basketball courts later. Kiriko: Sure. But I don't play without stakes. Pharah: Likewise. What are you willing to lose? Kiriko: Oh, Pharah-chan... I've never lost.
Pharah: I don't work with criminals. Kiriko: What's right isn't always what's legal. Pharah: Then you change the laws. Kiriko: Heh, easy for you to say.
Pharah : Why does your face look so familiar? Lifeweaver : There's a price on my head in 17 countries. I'm hoping for an even 20. Pharah : Yeah, that's it.
Lúcio: All right. Let's hear that fighting spirit! Pharah: Rawrrr! Lúcio: That's exactly what I'm talking about! Woo!
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Pharah : I like those really big dogs! The ones they use to ward off bears? Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Pharah : If you ever need help, just fly to me, Angela. Mercy : *laughs* Ah, my hero! You're like a knight in flying armor. Pharah : That's what I'm going for.

Ramattra: Your armor... is interesting. What does it use as a power source? Pharah: Planning to steal it for your own designs? Heh, nice try. Ramattra: I was being polite. Frankly, it's a little primitive for my tastes.
Ramattra: You were one of Anubis ' jailers! ...You should have destroyed it. Pharah: That is... not what I would have expected you to say. Ramattra: Of course not. You humans love your assumptions.
Pharah: You stole a lot of things that Helix was supposed to protect. Roadhog: What's it to you? Pharah: My unit would've eaten you alive. Roadhog: *laughter*
Pharah: I think I'm going to get a chihuahua. Sojourn: You're joking. Pharah: Why, what's wrong with chihuahuas? Sojourn: Uh, well, for starters, they aren't corgis .
Soldier: 76: Can't believe Ana Amari 's kid took up with mercenaries like Helix . Pharah: Oh, as opposed to, whatever you are?
Torbjörn: Y'know, Fareeha, it's not a sign of weakness if you take it easy sometimes. Pharah: Mistakes arise when people turn careless. Torbjörn: *sigh* Like mother , like daughter...
Winston: I've got one! What do you call a sleeping detective? Pharah: Tired. Winston: No! Undercover! Pharah: Ah. Huh. Sorry, I forgot to laugh. Again.
Winston: Here's another one! What sickness do pilots usually get? Pharah: Sick of your jokes? Winston: The flew! Pharah: Okay, Winston.
Winston: Do you know what happens to a bad joke about flying? Pharah: Ugh, here we go... Winston: It never lands! Pharah: Clearly.
Winston: Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Pharah: No one wants that.
Pharah: Hey, Winston. Want to hear a secret joke about peanut butter? Winston: I sure do! Pharah: Sorry, can't tell you. You might spread it. Winston: Aww... *gasps* Wait... I get it!

Zarya: Just like we practiced, Amari: I pull them together , you blow them up ! Pharah: I'm not waiting, I'm going to blow them up right away! Zarya: Yes, but when I pull them together, then you blow them up especially.
Zarya : Just like we planned! I pulled them together, and... Pharah : Yeah-yeah-yeah, I blew them up.
map-specific: Fly, fools, get with the times! Prepare yourselves for Pharah's rhymes!
I'm going to shoot you down. Pharah reporting, coming to town!
I'm the best when push comes to shove, direct complaints to my metal glove. Here comes the moment that you all love... JUSTICE RAINS FROM ABOVE! Lyrical superiority achieved!
Pop it, lock it. Mercy in my pocket. Even Genji can't seem to block it!
Was the sun in your eyes? (final blow)
They definitely know basketball here. Even the teenagers will break your ankles in a pickup game.
City of unfettered scientists, yeah... until they call Helix in tears at two in the morning because the wolfbats escaped... again.
